competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

provider.name: FIFA Official API

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Lucas Digne (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by William Saliba (France).
Attempt saved. Alexander Isak (Sweden) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Mike Maignan (France). Assisted by Viktor Gyökeres.

events.description: 伊萨克射正。 哲凯赖什参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Aurélien Tchouaméni (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Ousmane Dembélé (France) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Foul by Adrien Rabiot (France).
Michael Olise (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Adrien Rabiot (France) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Corner, France. Conceded by Gabriel Gudmundsson.
Attempt saved. Lucas Digne (France) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Jacob Widell Zetterström (Sweden).
Attempt saved. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Jacob Widell Zetterström (Sweden). Assisted by Bradley Barcola.

events.description: 姆巴佩射正。 布拉德利·巴克拉参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by William Saliba (France).
Attempt missed. Bradley Barcola (France) left footed shot from the left side of the box is too high. Assisted by Adrien Rabiot.

events.description: 布拉德利·巴克拉射门偏出。 阿德里安·拉比奥参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, France. Kylian Mbappé is caught offside.
Foul by Michael Olise (France).
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Foul by Adrien Rabiot (France).
Attempt missed. Alexander Isak (Sweden) right footed shot from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Yasin Ayari with a through ball following a set piece situation.

events.description: 伊萨克射门偏出。 亚辛·阿亚里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Ousmane Dembélé (France) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Aurélien Tchouaméni.

events.description: 登贝莱射门被封堵。 奥雷连·楚阿梅尼参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, France. Conceded by Elliot Stroud.
Attempt saved. Adrien Rabiot (France) left footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Jacob Widell Zetterström (Sweden).
Corner, France. Conceded by Victor Lindelöf.
Corner, France. Conceded by Gabriel Gudmundsson.
Attempt missed. Adrien Rabiot (France) left footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Ousmane Dembélé.

events.description: 阿德里安·拉比奥射门偏出。 登贝莱参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Aurélien Tchouaméni (France).
Attempt missed. Ousmane Dembélé (France) left footed shot from the right side of the box is close, but misses to the left.
Foul by Lucas Bergvall (Sweden).
Attempt missed. Dayot Upamecano (France) header from the centre of the box misses to the right following a set piece situation.

events.description: 达约特·乌帕梅卡诺射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Dayot Upamecano (France).
Attempt saved. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Jacob Widell Zetterström (Sweden). Assisted by Adrien Rabiot.

events.description: 姆巴佩射正。 阿德里安·拉比奥参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Adrien Rabiot (France).
Attempt missed. Michael Olise (France) left footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Aurélien Tchouaméni.

events.description: 奥利塞射门偏出。 奥雷连·楚阿梅尼参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, France. Conceded by Daniel Svensson.
Attempt blocked. Jules Koundé (France) left footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Ousmane Dembélé.

events.description: 朱尔斯·昆德射门被封堵。 登贝莱参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Michael Olise (France) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Jacob Widell Zetterström (Sweden). Assisted by Kylian Mbappé.

events.description: 奥利塞射正。 姆巴佩参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, France. Conceded by Jacob Widell Zetterström.
Goal! France 1, Sweden 0. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Ousmane Dembélé following a corner.
Fourth official has announced 3 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时3分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half begins France 1, Sweden 0.
Jules Koundé (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Elliot Stroud (Sweden) right footed shot from the centre of the box is high and wide to the right.

events.description: 埃利奥特·斯特劳德射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Sweden. Daniel Svensson is caught offside.
Attempt missed. Aurélien Tchouaméni (France) right footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Kylian Mbappé.

events.description: 奥雷连·楚阿梅尼射门偏出。 姆巴佩参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, France. Ousmane Dembélé is caught offside.
Goal! France 2, Sweden 0. Bradley Barcola (France) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Michael Olise with a through ball following a fast break.

events.description: 布拉德利·巴克拉破门。 比分 2-0。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Lucas Digne (France).
Corner, Sweden. Conceded by Lucas Digne.
Attempt missed. Lucas Bergvall (Sweden) header from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Daniel Svensson with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 卢卡斯·伯格瓦尔射门偏出。 丹尼尔·斯文森参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Michael Olise (France) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Jacob Widell Zetterström (Sweden). Assisted by Ousmane Dembélé.

events.description: 奥利塞射正。 登贝莱参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, France. Conceded by Jacob Widell Zetterström.
Attempt blocked. Michael Olise (France) left footed shot from the left side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Kylian Mbappé.

events.description: 奥利塞射门被封堵。 姆巴佩参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, France. Conceded by Gabriel Gudmundsson.
Substitution, Sweden. Taha Ali replaces Elliot Stroud.

events.description: 塔哈·阿里替补登场，换下埃利奥特·斯特劳德。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Sweden. Besfort Zeneli replaces Lucas Bergvall.

events.description: 贝斯福特泽尼利替补登场，换下卢卡斯·伯格瓦尔。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Dayot Upamecano (France) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Adrien Rabiot.

events.description: 达约特·乌帕梅卡诺射门被封堵。 阿德里安·拉比奥参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt saved. Michael Olise (France) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Jacob Widell Zetterström (Sweden). Assisted by Kylian Mbappé.

events.description: 奥利塞射正。 姆巴佩参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! France 3, Sweden 0. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Michael Olise with a through ball.
Substitution, France. Malo Gusto replaces Jules Koundé.

events.description: 马洛·古斯托替补登场，换下朱尔斯·昆德。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, France. Désiré Doué replaces Ousmane Dembélé.

events.description: 德西尔·杜埃替补登场，换下登贝莱。

qualifiers.espnText: Aurélien Tchouaméni (France) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Substitution, France. Théo Hernández replaces Lucas Digne.

events.description: 西奥·埃尔南德斯替补登场，换下卢卡斯·迪涅。

qualifiers.espnText: Désiré Doué (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 加布里埃尔·古德蒙森犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Désiré Doué (France) right footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Jacob Widell Zetterström (Sweden). Assisted by Malo Gusto.

events.description: 德西尔·杜埃射正。 马洛·古斯托参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Bradley Barcola (France) left footed shot from the left side of the six yard box is saved in the centre of the goal by Jacob Widell Zetterström (Sweden). Assisted by Théo Hernández.

events.description: 布拉德利·巴克拉射正。 西奥·埃尔南德斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, France. Conceded by Jacob Widell Zetterström.
Substitution, Sweden. Mattias Svanberg replaces Daniel Svensson.

events.description: 马蒂亚斯·斯万贝里替补登场，换下丹尼尔·斯文森。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Sweden. Benjamin Nygren replaces Yasin Ayari.

events.description: 本杰明·尼格伦替补登场，换下亚辛·阿亚里。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, France. Jean-Philippe Mateta replaces Kylian Mbappé.

events.description: 让·菲利普·马塔塔替补登场，换下姆巴佩。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, France. Rayan Cherki replaces Michael Olise.

events.description: 拉扬·切尔基替补登场，换下奥利塞。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Adrien Rabiot (France).
Attempt missed. Mattias Svanberg (Sweden) right footed shot from outside the box misses to the left.

events.description: 马蒂亚斯·斯万贝里射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, France. Bradley Barcola is caught offside.
Attempt saved. Viktor Gyökeres (Sweden) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Mike Maignan (France).
Substitution, Sweden. Gustaf Nilsson replaces Alexander Isak.

events.description: 古斯塔夫·尼尔森替补登场，换下伊萨克。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Jean-Philippe Mateta (France).
Fourth official has announced 4 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时1分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Malo Gusto (France).
Attempt missed. Jean-Philippe Mateta (France) left footed shot from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Désiré Doué with a cross.

events.description: 让·菲利普·马塔塔射门偏出。 德西尔·杜埃参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Rayan Cherki (France).
Attempt blocked. Gustaf Nilsson (Sweden) header from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Benjamin Nygren with a cross.

events.description: 古斯塔夫·尼尔森射门被封堵。 本杰明·尼格伦参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Mattias Svanberg (Sweden) right footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Mike Maignan (France). Assisted by Anthony Elanga.

events.description: 马蒂亚斯·斯万贝里射正。 埃兰加参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half ends, France 3, Sweden 0.
